title: Senate for first time approves a war powers resolution in a rebuke to Trump over Iran conflict

snapshot.title: Senate for first time approves a war powers resolution in a rebuke to Trump over Iran conflict
snapshot.description: WASHINGTON: The Senate for the first time approved a war powers resolution Tuesday seeking to block US military action against Iran, as lawmakers warily watch President Donald Trump’s efforts to resolve a conflict that the administration launched on its own and now needs Congress to fund. It was the 10th time the Senate has tried to stop the war, and the outcome, on a vote of
snapshot.author: AP
snapshot.pageTitle: Senate for first time approves a war powers resolution in a rebuke to Trump over Iran conflict | Arab News
